name: @ironforge/workflow-wait-for-deploy
description: Workflow task Lambda — wait-for-deploy. Single-shot polling Lambda invoked in an SFN Wait→Choice→Task loop (same pattern as wait-for-cloudfront — see docs/conventions.md § "SFN-orchestrated polling pattern"). Calls GitHub's listWorkflowRuns filtered by run-name match (Deploy [<jobId>]) until the correlated run reaches status === completed. Throws IronforgePollTimeoutError on 10-minute budget exhaustion; throws IronforgeDeployRunError on non-success conclusions. Status-integrity Lambda: lets Finalize transition Service.status to "live" only after the user's deploy.yml has actually completed.
